compile_output: Success with warnings (ignoring nodiscard Status return)
notes: Query completes but produces wrong results due to floating-point precision error. One row differs by 0.01 in sum_disc_price (1058580922144.96 expected vs 1058580922144.97 actual). Root cause: missing Kahan summation for compensated floating-point accumulation. Performance: 11,955ms for 59M rows with 4-group aggregation. Row group pruning only filters 1.4% of data (1183/1200 groups remain).
